title: AppDynamics Application Model
description: Schema representing the AppDynamics application monitoring model including applications, tiers, nodes, business transactions, and backends.

Application.description: A business application monitored by the AppDynamics Controller.

id.description: The internal numeric identifier for the application.

name.description: The name of the business application.

description.description: An optional description of the application.

Tier.description: A tier within a monitored business application representing a logical grouping of nodes.

id.description: The internal numeric identifier for the tier.

type.description: The agent type associated with this tier.

agentType.description: The type of agent instrumentation used by the tier.

numberOfNodes.description: The number of nodes belonging to this tier.

Node.description: A node representing a single application instance or process within a tier.

id.description: The internal numeric identifier for the node.

type.description: The agent type associated with this node.

tierId.description: The numeric ID of the tier this node belongs to.

tierName.description: The name of the tier this node belongs to.

machineId.description: The numeric ID of the machine hosting this node.

machineName.description: The name of the machine hosting this node.

machineOSType.description: The operating system type of the host machine.

agentType.description: The type of agent instrumentation used by the node.

appAgentVersion.description: The version of the application agent running on this node.

machineAgentVersion.description: The version of the machine agent running on the host.

ipAddresses.description: The IP addresses associated with this node.

BusinessTransaction.description: A business transaction representing a distinct request flow through the application.

id.description: The internal numeric identifier for the business transaction.

name.description: The name of the business transaction.

entryPointType.description: The entry point type for the transaction.

internalName.description: The internal unique name of the transaction.

tierId.description: The numeric ID of the tier where the transaction entry point is detected.

tierName.description: The name of the tier where the transaction entry point is detected.

background.description: Indicates whether this is a background transaction.

Backend.description: A backend component representing an external dependency detected by the Controller.

id.description: The internal numeric identifier for the backend.

name.description: The name of the backend component.

exitPointType.description: The exit point type for the backend.

properties.description: Name-value properties describing the backend connection.

MetricValue.description: A single metric data point with statistical values for a time period.

startTimeInMillis.description: The start time in Unix epoch milliseconds.

occurrences.description: The number of observations in this time period.

current.description: The current or last observed value.

sum.description: The sum of all values in this time period.

value.description: The computed value based on the rollup type.

applications.description: The list of monitored business applications.

tiers.description: The list of tiers within the application.

nodes.description: The list of nodes within the application.

businessTransactions.description: The list of business transactions detected in the application.

backends.description: The list of backend components detected in the application.
